spec_match.rationale: Demonstrates the spec's headline surface — page mentions 3 of 3 extracted API names from the spec.

interactive.rationale: The audit now exposes five selectable request states and a rerunnable SecurityInfo audit with score, weighted rows, and raw object output.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Page covers the promises the feature index makes for this concept.

edge_cases.rationale: Chrome DevTools verified secure, raw DER, missing extraInfoSpec, broken TLS, and weak-state branches. Non-secure states cap the verdict to failing.

references.rationale: Cites the chromestatus.com/feature/<id> reference link as required.

design_system.rationale: Uses CSS variables throughout, no raw hex, button overrides keep bg+color paired.

summary: Chrome DevTools verified the corrected SecurityInfo audit across all five request states. No open questions remain for this concept.
